questions.question: What is the standard duration for an 8-hour working day in many countries?
questions.explanation: An 8-hour working day is a common standard in many countries, allowing for a balance between work and rest.

questions.question: In terms of time units, how many 60-minute periods make up an 8-hour period?
questions.explanation: There are 8/60 = 2/15 of an hour in each minute. 60 minutes would be equal to 8/60 * 60 = 8 hours.

questions.question: What is the duration of a typical 8-hour workday in terms of 60-minute blocks?
questions.explanation: An 8-hour workday can be divided into 8/60 = 4 60-minute blocks.

questions.question: How many hours are typically considered a standard full-time workday in many organizations?
questions.explanation: In many organizations, a standard full-time workday is 8 hours.

questions.question: In terms of fractional parts, what fraction of a day is an 8-hour period?
questions.explanation: An 8-hour workday is equivalent to 1/6 of a 12-hour day.
